title: Heart Mod
description: Rebalanced health progression with exploration rewards and a strategic, base-focused healing system
body:
## **❤️ Heart Mod – Expanded Health & Healing System for Minecraft** ### Overview This mod rebalances gameplay by encouraging exploration through collectible Heart Crystals that increase health while adding a base-focused healing system with auto-regeneration turned off, requiring players to be more careful and avoid mistakes. --- ### Key Features - **Dynamic Health Progression** Start with 5 hearts (10 HP). Collect the new item, Heart Crystal. Each Heart Crystal increases your max health by 1 heart (2 HP). You can find them only in naturally generated chests. ![Health Progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdcaa1e1c441fcc771b8978580cc77883d7f9a9e_0.webp)
- **Challenge** Auto-regeneration is turned off by default. You need to avoid dangerous situations and/or find ways to manage your healing. ![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0157df29c072df40baefccfd262a09b6d46729c6_0.webp)
- **Achievements** Integrated with Minecraft’s advancements system. Track your healing progress and earn rewards for both Bandages and Heart Crystals. ![Achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb0f72ef933dfdc61b14a869168883709c97ba8.png)
- **Bed Healing**
Now beds don’t skip the night, but they heal you. While you rest in bed, your HP will gradually increase. ![Bed Healing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d2ac5c676803d3ed9d494366c67a373398c888_0.webp)
- **Penalty System**
Your inventory stays after death (keepInventory is true), but you will lose Crystal Hearts.
The number of lost Crystal Hearts increases with the size of your health bar:
![On Dead](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995dfb9aacdc4d5a2862379d78e4e756f89a6ffe.png)
- **New Structure**
Heart Crystals can be found in loot and in newly generated structures - Crystal Shrines.
Watch out for the traps inside. ![Crystal Shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcdb5db228311c96cedef556b1d9a6633efea31.jpeg) --- ### Crafting Recipes - **Improvised Bandage** ![Improvised Bandage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df31d01fbc22aa35be8a7d9993165bffac7e5b70_0.webp) Restores 1 heart (+2 HP) but also adds a Slowness effect.

- **Bandage** ![Bandage crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a59502d1e86d0377ccf38e94aa04c028aa93dcf_0.webp) Restores 1 heart (+2 HP).

- **Enhanced Bandage** ![Enhanced Bandage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ab05452b0c32a86e90604de8f17051332f691eb.png) Restores 2.5 hearts (+5 HP). --- ### Mod Configuration Every parametr now can be easly change via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). ![Mod Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17acb7562ba905ab1786329df2b182bdbd41d48.png) --- ### Suggested Mods - [Day/Night Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/daynight-control) - Customize the length of day and night. _(Created specifically for this mod)_
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - A well-known teleportation mod. Great for base building and exploration balance.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - For managing your mod settings.
